hero.subtitle: StudyOS is the operating system that prepares your university exams for you. Generate summaries, mindmaps, flashcards and quizzes from your class material in minutes.
hero.trust: No credit card · Cancel anytime · 4 languages

features.label: SECTION 01 · WHAT IT DOES
features.title: More than a chatbot.
features.subtitle: StudyOS doesn't give you random answers. It gives you a system: plan, material, review and tracking — all integrated.
features.f1_desc: AI reads your notes, slides and texts, detects key concepts and organises them automatically.
features.f2_desc: A day-by-day schedule until your exam, adapted to your material, your pace and your available time.
features.f3_desc: Flashcards, quizzes, mindmaps and summaries automatically generated from your own content.

how.label: SECTION 02 · THE SYSTEM
how.title: From PDF to passed in
how.step1_desc: PDFs, notes, slides. Whatever you have. AI reads it all.
how.step2_desc: Summaries, mindmaps, flashcards and quizzes generated in minutes from your material.
how.step3_desc: Follow the schedule day by day until your exam. Straightforward.

forwho.label: SECTION 03 · FOR YOU
forwho.title: Built for students who
forwho.p1_desc: When you have 5 subjects in 3 weeks and there's never enough time.
forwho.p2_desc: Enormous volumes of material that need to be mastered in depth.
forwho.p3_desc: AI summarises and explains in your language, regardless of what language the material is in.
forwho.p4_desc: When time is scarce and you need to turn every study hour into results.

outcomes.label: SECTION 04 · RESULTS
outcomes.title: What you're going to
outcomes.s2_label: more material covered before the exam
outcomes.s3_label: subjects managed at once without burning out
outcomes.s4_label: available when you study at midnight

mockup.label: SECTION 05 · THE PRODUCT
mockup.title: This is what it looks like
mockup.subtitle: A clean, distraction-free interface. Everything you need, nothing you don't.

plans.trial_desc: To try the platform without any commitment.
plans.basic_desc: For the student who needs the essentials.
plans.plus_desc: For the regular student with several subjects.
plans.pro_desc: The most complete plan for final exam season.

testimonials.label: SECTION 07 · STUDENTS
testimonials.t1_quote: I prepared three subjects at once for my January finals. With StudyOS I had a clear plan from day one. I passed everything.
testimonials.t2_quote: The PDF analysis is surprisingly good. It generated flashcards that felt like I'd written them myself. And the Microeconomics mindmap was perfect.
testimonials.t3_quote: I studied my notes in Spanish but the course material was in English. StudyOS integrated everything and built my plan mixing both languages.

faq.label: SECTION 08 · FAQ
faq.title: What people ask us most.
faq.q1: What happens if I cancel my subscription?
faq.a1: You can cancel at any time from your dashboard. Your account stays active until the end of the already-paid period. No additional charges or penalties.
faq.q2: Are my PDFs private? GDPR compliant?
faq.a2: Yes. Your files are processed on European servers and are not used to train any AI model. We comply with GDPR. You can delete all your data at any time from your profile.
faq.q3: Does it work in Spanish, German, Estonian and English?
faq.a3: Yes. StudyOS supports those four languages for both the interface and content analysis. You can upload material in any language and the AI will process it correctly.
faq.q4: Do I need a credit card for the free trial?
faq.a4: No. The 7-day trial is completely free and requires no payment information. We only ask for your email and password to create your account.
faq.q5: What happens if I run out of credits during the month?
faq.a5: You can buy extra credits at any time. Credits don't expire and stack with your plan. You can also wait for the next month when they renew.
faq.q6: Does it work well on mobile?
faq.a6: Yes. The interface is fully responsive. You can study from your phone, review flashcards or follow your study plan without any issues.
faq.q7: Can I upload entire books or very long texts?
faq.a7: Yes, within reasonable limits. PDFs of up to 300 pages process without issues. For longer books, we recommend uploading chapters separately for better analysis.
faq.q8: How is it different from ChatGPT?
faq.a8: ChatGPT is a general chat. StudyOS is a structured system: it analyses your specific material, builds a personalised plan with concrete dates, and generates organised review material. It's not the same as asking a chatbot for summaries.
faq.q9: What happens to my data if I cancel my account?
faq.a9: You have 30 days to export all your content before it's permanently deleted. You can download your summaries, flashcards and study plans in PDF or text format.
faq.q10: Can I download the generated material?
faq.a10: Yes. Pro and Plus plans include export. You can download summaries, flashcards and study plans as PDFs. Basic plan has online access without export.

cta_final.title: Your next exam,
cta_final.subtitle: Upload your material today. You'll have your plan in minutes.
cta_final.trust: No card · No commitment · Cancel anytime

footer.tagline: The operating system for students who pass.

pricing_page.hero_subtitle: Start with 7 days free. No card. Cancel whenever you want.
pricing_page.credits_section_desc: Buy extra credits that never expire. They stack with your plan.
pricing_page.faq_q1: Can I change my plan at any time?
pricing_page.faq_a1: Yes. The change applies at the start of the next billing period. If you upgrade, the change can be applied immediately with proration.
pricing_page.faq_a2: Each month your credits renew according to your plan. Unused credits don't carry over to the next month. Extra purchased credits are permanent.
pricing_page.faq_a3: For EU customers, VAT is applied according to the EU VAT rules for the relevant country. For non-EU customers, the displayed price is the final price.
pricing_page.faq_q4: Can I pay by invoice for my company?
pricing_page.faq_a4: Yes. Write to us at hello@studyos.app with your company details and we'll issue the corresponding invoice.
pricing_page.faq_a5: If you cancel within 7 days of starting a paid plan, we'll refund you in full, no questions asked. After that period, there are no refunds for the already-billed period.

credits_page.hero_subtitle: For those final exam months when your plan runs short. They don't expire. They stack with your plan.
credits_page.what_desc: Each credit lets you analyse one additional PDF beyond what's included in your monthly plan.
credits_page.what_2: Never expire — use them when you need them
credits_page.what_3: Used automatically when plan runs out
credits_page.when_1_desc: You're uploading notes for 5 subjects at once. Your plan isn't enough. Credits cover the rest.
credits_page.when_2_desc: You enrolled in an intensive course and need more analyses than planned.
credits_page.when_3_desc: You have the Basic plan but this month you want to generate question sets for an important exam.
credits_page.calc_title: How many credits do you need?
credits_page.calc_label: PDFs you plan to upload this month:
credits_page.calc_result_0: Your PDFs fit within your monthly plan.
credits_page.calc_result_credits: You would need {n} extra credits on top of your plan.
credits_page.faq_a1: No. Purchased credits are permanent and never expire. Plan credits do renew each month and unused ones are lost.
credits_page.faq_q2: Can I use credits without a plan?
credits_page.faq_a2: No. Credits are complementary to a plan. You need at least an active Basic plan to use them.
credits_page.faq_q3: Can credits be shared between accounts?
credits_page.faq_a3: No. Credits are individual per account.
credits_page.faq_a4: When you buy them. It's a one-time payment, not a subscription.
credits_page.faq_q5: Do extra credits give access to higher plan features?
credits_page.faq_a5: No. Credits only add PDF analysis capacity. To access question sets (if you're on Basic) you need to upgrade your plan.

about_page.hero_subtitle: We built StudyOS because we lived the problem. Preparing for a university exam shouldn't be a race against chaos.
about_page.story_title: The problem we decided to solve
about_page.story_p1: In 2025, during finals season, an engineering student in Vienna had 6 subjects, 40 PDFs, and 3 weeks. The usual: no idea where to start.
about_page.story_p2: He tried ChatGPT for quick summaries. It worked, kind of. But no plan. No structure. No tracking. Just random answers when you phrased the question right.
about_page.story_p3: That's where StudyOS was born. Not as another chatbot, but as an exam preparation operating system: a place where you upload your material and come out with a clear plan, generated review material, and a structure that respects how exam preparation actually works.
about_page.mission_desc: So that any university student, in any country in Europe, with any budget, can prepare their exams with the same quality as someone with access to the best tutors.
about_page.stack_1_desc: We use Claude by Anthropic, a model designed with a focus on safety and honesty. Your material is not used to train any model.
about_page.stack_2_desc: European servers, GDPR compliance, data encrypted at rest and in transit. You can delete everything at any time.
about_page.stack_3_desc: StudyOS OÜ is registered in Estonia under the e-Residency framework. European regulation, total transparency.
about_page.cta_desc: We're building this in the open. Write to us if you want to know more.

contact_page.hero_subtitle: Questions, feedback or just want to know more? We reply within 24 business hours.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: How we collect, use and protect your personal data.
privacy.s1: StudyOS OÜ ('StudyOS', 'we'), with registered address at Viru väljak 2, 10111 Tallinn, Estonia, is the data controller for your personal data under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).
privacy.s2_a: Account data: name, email address, password (stored hashed).
privacy.s2_b: Usage data: PDF files you upload for analysis, generated content (summaries, flashcards, study plans).
privacy.s2_c: Payment data: processed directly by Stripe. StudyOS does not store card data.
privacy.s2_d: Technical data: IP address, browser type, operating system, pages visited.
privacy.s3_a: Contract performance (Art. 6.1.b GDPR): to provide the service.
privacy.s3_b: Legitimate interest (Art. 6.1.f GDPR): to improve the service and prevent fraud.
privacy.s3_c: Consent (Art. 6.1.a GDPR): for optional marketing communications.
privacy.s4_title: 4. How long we retain your data
privacy.s4: We retain your data while your account is active. If you delete your account, your data is erased within 30 days, except data we must retain for legal obligations (billing data: 7 years under tax regulations).
privacy.s5: You have the right to access, rectify, erase, restrict processing, object to processing and port your data. To exercise these rights, write to us at privacy@studyos.app.
privacy.s6: Your data is processed on servers within the European Union. Some service providers may be located outside the EU; in those cases we apply adequate transfer mechanisms (standard contractual clauses).

terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.subtitle: Terms of use of the StudyOS platform.
terms.s1: By using StudyOS you accept these Terms and Conditions. If you disagree, you may not use the service.
terms.s2: StudyOS is a university exam preparation platform that uses artificial intelligence to analyse study material and generate personalised learning content.
terms.s3_a: You may use StudyOS for your own personal study.
terms.s3_b: You may not: share your account, use the service to generate content for third parties for commercial purposes, or attempt to compromise system security.
terms.s3_c: You may not upload copyrighted material you do not have the right to use.
terms.s4: Subscriptions are billed monthly or annually depending on the chosen option. The 7-day free trial requires no credit card. After the trial period, a paid subscription is required to continue.
terms.s5: We offer a full refund if you cancel within 7 days of starting a paid plan. Outside that period, there are no refunds for the already-billed period.
terms.s6: Content generated by StudyOS from your material is yours. StudyOS makes no claim over content it generates using your files.
terms.s7: StudyOS does not guarantee specific academic results. The platform is a study support tool, not a substitute for the student's own judgement.
terms.s8: These Terms are governed by the law of the Republic of Estonia. Any dispute shall be submitted to the competent courts of Tallinn, Estonia.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.subtitle: What cookies we use and why.
cookies.s1: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They allow us to remember your preferences and understand how you use the platform.
cookies.s3: You can reject non-essential cookies from the cookie banner when you enter the site, or modify your preferences at any time from settings.
cookies.banner_text: We use essential cookies for the site to function and, with your consent, analytics cookies to improve the experience.
